assumptions: The developer has a browser and can complete DigitalOcean signup if no account exists.
No App Platform app or Control Panel project resources exist yet.
The selected sample path uses App Platform rather than Droplets or Functions.

developer_goal: Create a DigitalOcean account, deploy a first App Platform sample application, and open its public URL.

first_success.outcome: App Platform has deployed the selected starter and exposed a Hello World style site at the Overview URL.
first_success.observable_signal: Opening the URL at the top of the app Overview page shows the sample website.

route_selection.rule: Prefer Control Panel sample deployment over API or doctl; exact starter and signup sequence remain unresolved.

candidates.name: Deploy from template repository sample
candidates.reason: Documented as requiring no additional repository information, but no canonical starter is named.

candidates.name: Create new GitHub repository from sample then deploy
candidates.reason: Same sample surface with extra GitHub repository creation before App Platform continues.

candidates.name: App Platform Quickstart from own Git repo
candidates.reason: Requires an existing repository and more configuration than the sample template branch.

candidates.name: doctl or Apps API
candidates.reason: Requires tokens and an app spec; Control Panel is the documented primary create path.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to a DigitalOcean account and reach the Control Panel.

required_fields.label: Signup or login identity fields
required_fields.notes: Support pages mention email, Google, GitHub, verification codes, locks, and payment method without one chronological signup route.

required_path.observable_result: The developer is authenticated in the Control Panel.

required_path.action: Choose Create > App Platform, open Templates, select a starter, and choose Deploy from template repository.

required_fields.label: Starter template
required_fields.notes: Template grid exists; no single default starter is designated.

required_path.observable_result: App Platform presents detected resources and configuration for the starter.

required_path.action: Review resource, info, and pricing settings required by the starter, then Create App.

required_fields.label: Resource and plan settings required by the starter

required_path.observable_result: App Platform creates the app and starts the first deployment.

required_path.action: After deployment completes, open the URL at the top of the app Overview page.
required_path.observable_result: The browser shows the sample Hello World style website.

prerequisites.description: Control Panel access with permission to create App Platform apps.
Payment method may be required for identity verification before paid resources.

external_gates.description: Account verification or lock handling can block signup before Control Panel use.
Payment method may be required to verify identity before creating resources.

unavoidable_waits.description: App Platform must build and deploy the starter before the Overview URL serves the sample site.

platform_outcomes.description: Create App starts automatic build and deploy for the selected starter.
A public Overview URL is assigned when the deployment finishes.

excluded.reason: Documentation is evidence, not a product action.
Sample path presents them as optional.

excluded.item: Forking into a new GitHub repository when Deploy from template repository is available
excluded.reason: Template-repository option avoids that GitHub creation detour.

sources.title: Deploy Sample Apps to App Platform
How to Create Apps in App Platform
App Platform Pricing
evidence_supported: Resource pricing variation by component type

sources.title: Why do I need to enter a payment method?

uncertainties.question: What is the complete current signup, verification, and payment-method sequence for a new DigitalOcean developer?
uncertainties.impact: Account-segment action and field counts before Control Panel cannot be verified.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Fresh-account Control Panel signup walkthrough with dated screenshots of required fields and gates.

uncertainties.question: Which starter template is the canonical shortest sample, and does it stay on free static-site resources?
uncertainties.impact: Resource fields, price, build behavior, and rendered content change by starter.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Human selection of one official starter plus confirmation of its App Platform resource types and pricing tier.
